summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kingsday Discount Code System. All backend APIs working correctly (25/25 passed). Frontend spin flow, admin panel with discount codes management all functional. Key design requirement verified: 10% Discount wins return coupon_code=null in API (code sent via email only).

issues: Console hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - React render wrapper issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
Email normalization prevents alias abuse (gmail+tag@gmail.com normalized)
Discount code assignment uses atomic find_one_and_update to prevent race conditions

success_rate.backend: 100% (25/25 tests passed, 1 skipped due to probability)

seed_data_creation: 507 discount codes in database (500 from CSV + 7 test uploads). 2 codes assigned during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_discount_codes_api.py cover all Kingsday endpoints. 507 discount codes seeded. Email sending via Resend only works for housedecoded@gmail.com in test mode - email_sent will be false for test emails. Spin wheel has 6% chance for 10% Discount, 90% Better Luck Next Time.
passed_tests: POST /api/kingsday/spin - one spin per user enforced
GET /api/admin/discount-codes - list with optional status filter
Email normalization prevents gmail alias abuse
Frontend: Spin wheel animation and result modal
Frontend: Result modal shows correct content per prize type
Frontend: Discount codes tab with stats, upload, filters
notes: Resend email API configured but only sends to housedecoded@gmail.com in test mode. This is expected Resend sandbox behavior, not a bug.
